title: Tinkers' Advanced
description: A Tcon addon that contains original contents and adds some integrations to technology mods.
body:
Tinkers' Advanced is a Tconstruct addon that adds some original contents and some integrations to Technology mods.
*Note: This mod is in early development with little contents and server performance is unknown.Also it requires test verson of Tinkers' Construst on 1.20.1 to work.

Current Features:
- A brand new hi-tech weapon that fires fluid to deal damage (Similar to Swasher but different).
- AE2 integrations including Certus Quartz and Fluix Quartz.
- Mek integrations including Alloy Atomic,Refined Obsidian,Refined Glowstone and Antimatter.
- New material bismuthinite and bismuth.The former can be found underground and the latter requires a Foundry to obtain.

Planning Features:
- PnC:R integrations with additional materials.
- Anvil Craft integrations with additional materials.
- Thermal integrations.
- Immersive Engineering integrations.
- Original materials added to exisiting integrations.
